name: Marie Calendar's Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the corn muffin mix according to the directions on the box.
2. Prepare the yellow cake mix according to the directions on the box in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the prepared yellow cake mix into the prepared corn muffin mix and stir well.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x12x2 pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
